title: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 264 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of June 4 (from 18:00 on June 3), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the Voronezh region. - Russian Federation, 293 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, Banderol barrage munitions and parody drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Kursk, Bryansk, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea...
description_en: 264 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of June 4 (from 18:00 on June 3), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the Voronezh region. - Russian Federation, 293 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, Banderol barrage munitions and parody drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Kursk, Bryansk, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT AR Crimea...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 264 ВОРОЖІ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 4 червня (з 18:00 3 червня) противник атакував балістичною ракетою Іскандер-М із Воронезької обл. -рф, 293 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас, баражуючими боєприпасами "Бандероль" та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Курськ, Брянськ, Міллєрово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Чауда – ТОТ АР Крим....

title: Kyiv: Drone attack on infrastructure
description: Russian drone attack targets infrastructure in Kyiv suburb, injuring 1. A Russian drone struck infrastructure in the Boryspil region of Kyiv Oblast overnight on June 4, sparking a fire at the site and injuring one person, Governor Mykola Kalashnyk said.
description_en: Russian drone attack targets infrastructure in Kyiv suburb, injuring 1. A Russian drone struck infrastructure in the Boryspil region of Kyiv Oblast overnight on June 4, sparking a fire at the site and injuring one person, Governor Mykola Kalashnyk said.

title: Kyiv: Power outage reported
description: Russian oil exports to Hungary, Slovakia via Druzhba pipeline return to normal. Russian oil exports to Hungary and Slovakia via the Druzhba pipeline have returned to normal after a months-long outage that fueled tensions between Ukraine and the Central European countries.

description: EU ambassadors urgently discuss opening first cluster for Ukraine on evening of 3 June The issue of starting preparations for the official opening of the first EU negotiating cluster (Fundamentals) for Ukraine and Moldova has been urgently added to the agenda of a meeting of the Committee of Permanent Representatives (Coreper) on the evening of 3 June. title: Ballistic missile launch detected

title: 3 missiles
description: We received RAS-3 missiles from our partners in the appropriate quantity, and then this quantity per month was reduced several times. It was not because of a shortage of money, but because of the war in the Middle East. This was reflected in various types of weapons. We replaced what we could with our domestic production, but we cannot replace RAS-3 yet. In the 25th year, we had the opportunity to negotiate with the American...
description_en: We received RAS-3 missiles from our partners in the appropriate quantity, and then this quantity per month was reduced several times. It was not because of a shortage of money, but because of the war in the Middle East. This was reflected in various types of weapons. We replaced what we could with our domestic production, but we cannot replace RAS-3 yet. In the 25th year, we had the opportunity to negotiate with the American...
description_uk: Ми отримували від наших партнерів ракети РАС-3 у відповідній кількості, а потім ця кількість на місяць була зменшена в рази. Це було не через дефіцит грошей, а через війну на Близькому Сході. Це відображалося на різних видах зброї. Що могли, ми заміняли своїм вітчизняним виробництвом, але РАС-3 ми поки що замінити не можемо. У 25-му році у нас з'явилася можливість домовитися з американським...

title: Kramatorsk: Casualties reported
description: Three people killed and four injured in Russian attack on Kramatorsk – photos Three people have been killed and four others injured in a Russian attack on Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast. Read the full article on our website
description_en: Three people killed and four injured in Russian attack on Kramatorsk – photos Three people have been killed and four others injured in a Russian attack on Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast. Read the full article on our website

title: Air defense active
description: I want to thank all the partners who help us get Patriot interceptor missiles through PURL. By doing this, you save lives in Ukraine. But the current volumes and rates of supply are not enough. We need more Patriot interceptor missiles, and we need them delivered faster. That is why the key thing we need to do together is to ensure the continued support of our anti-aircraft...
description_en: I want to thank all the partners who help us get Patriot interceptor missiles through PURL. By doing this, you save lives in Ukraine. But the current volumes and rates of supply are not enough. We need more Patriot interceptor missiles, and we need them delivered faster. That is why the key thing we need to do together is to ensure the continued support of our anti-aircraft...
description_uk: Хочу подякувати всім партнерам, які допомагають нам отримувати ракети-перехоплювачі Patriot через PURL. Роблячи це, ви рятуєте життя в Україні. Але нинішніх обсягів і темпів постачання недостатньо. Нам потрібно більше ракет-перехоплювачів Patriot, і нам потрібно, щоб їх постачали швидше. Саме тому ключове, що нам потрібно зробити разом, – забезпечити подальшу підтримку нашої протиповітряної...

title: Attack attack
description: Muscovites attacked the Novaya Poshta terminal in Dnipro. The fate of the parcels is still unknown. A few days earlier, one of the separate "NP" was destroyed in the Dnipro. For the destruction of parcels in our long-range sanctions, there should be some special "gifts" for swamps.
description_en: Muscovites attacked the Novaya Poshta terminal in Dnipro. The fate of the parcels is still unknown. A few days earlier, one of the separate "NP" was destroyed in the Dnipro. For the destruction of parcels in our long-range sanctions, there should be some special "gifts" for swamps.
description_uk: Московиты нанесли удар по терминалу "Новой почты" в Днепре. Судьба посылок пока неизвестна. Несколькими днями ранее в Днепре было уничтожено одно из отделений "НП". За уничтожение посылок в наших дальнобойных санкциях должны быть какие-то специальные "подарки" для болот.

title: Kherson: Artillery shelling near civilians
title_uk: Херсон: Артилерійський обстріл поблизу мирних жителів
description: Two killed, one injured in Russian artillery strike on Kherson Oblast Two people were killed and a woman was injured as Russian forces shelled the village of Pryozerne in the Kherson hromada on 3 June. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

title: Project 20380 corvette hit in Kronstadt ⚡️On the night of June 3,...
title_en: Project 20380 corvette hit in Kronstadt ⚡️On the night of June 3,...
title_uk: Корвет проекту 20380 влучив у Кронштадт ⚡️У ніч на 3 червня...
description: Project 20380 corvette hit in Kronstadt ⚡️On the night of June 3, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine in Kronstadt (one of the bases of the Baltic Fleet of the Russian Navy) hit a project 20380 "Steregushchy" corvette. According to preliminary information, it is about the ship "Boykiy". A large-scale fire has been confirmed on board the ship. The results and extent of damages are being clarified. Project 20380 corvettes are multipurpose combat...
description_en: Project 20380 corvette hit in Kronstadt ⚡️On the night of June 3, 2026, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine in Kronstadt (one of the bases of the Baltic Fleet of the Russian Navy) hit a project 20380 "Steregushchy" corvette. According to preliminary information, it is about the ship "Boykiy". A large-scale fire has been confirmed on board the ship. The results and extent of damages are being clarified. Project 20380 corvettes are multipurpose combat...
description_uk: Уражено корвет проєкту 20380 у Кронштадті ⚡️У ніч на 3 червня 2026 року підрозділи Сил оборони України у Кронштадті (одна з баз Балтійського флоту ВМФ рф) уразили корвет проєкту 20380 типу “Стерегущий”. За попередньою інформацією, йдеться про корабель “Бойкий”. На борту судна підтверджено масштабну пожежу. Результати і масштаби збитків уточнюються. Корвети проєкту 20380 є багатоцільовими бойовими...

title: Drone strike
description: Zelensky confirmed the strikes on St. Petersburg and Kronstadt. Drones "hit" the St. Petersburg oil terminal, located approximately 1,100 km from the Ukrainian border, as well as targets at the Russian Navy base in Kronstadt. In addition, an enterprise in the Tambov region involved in the production of Russian weapons was hit.
description_en: Zelensky confirmed the strikes on St. Petersburg and Kronstadt. Drones "hit" the St. Petersburg oil terminal, located approximately 1,100 km from the Ukrainian border, as well as targets at the Russian Navy base in Kronstadt. In addition, an enterprise in the Tambov region involved in the production of Russian weapons was hit.
description_uk: Зеленский подтвердил удары по Петербургу и Кронштадту Дроны «потрепали» Петербургский нефтяной терминал, расположенный примерно в 1100 км от украинской границы, а также цели на базе ВМФ РФ в Кронштадте. Кроме того, под удар попало предприятие в Тамбовской области, задействованное в производстве российского вооружения.
